narratives.name: Inflation Hedge Rally
narratives.description: Macro-economic conditions including inflation fears and monetary policy shifts are driving safe-haven flows into silver as a store of value.

narratives.name: Medical Applications Growth
narratives.description: Emerging applications of silver in medical devices and healthcare settings highlight novel demand drivers for the precious metal.

narratives.name: Industrial Demand Surge
narratives.description: Rising industrial demand for silver driven by green energy, semiconductors, and technology manufacturing is creating sustained bullish pressure on prices.

narratives.name: Inflation Hedge Rally
narratives.description: Macro-economic conditions including inflation fears and monetary policy shifts are driving safe-haven flows into silver as a store of value.

narratives.name: Industrial Demand Surge
narratives.description: Rising industrial demand for silver driven by green energy, semiconductors, and technology manufacturing is creating sustained bullish pressure on prices.

narratives.name: Supply Constraint Pressure
narratives.description: Global silver supply faces headwinds from mining disruptions, declining ore grades, and production constraints across major producing regions.
